title: Crispy Pak Choi Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy vegan stir fry made with crunchy pak choi, skillet-fried to perfection.
instructions: 1. Heat a small amount of oil in the skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
3. Add the pak choi and cook for 3-4 minutes, until tender.
4. Add the chili flakes and peanuts, and stir-fry for a further minute.
5. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Serve hot, garnished with additional peanuts if desired.
